SQLite is the live database — all reads and writes go through it. `issues.jsonl` is a git-synced artifact exported on demand: one entry per bead, committed to the repo for backup, sharing, and recovery. Concurrent claiming is handled by SQLite's `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` transaction — no server, no daemon, no flock required.\n8\t\n9\t## Core Principles\n10\t\n11\t1. **SQLite is the live store** — all mutations are SQL writes; reads are SQL queries. Fast, concurrent-read, serialized-write via WAL mode.\n12\t2. **JSONL is the git artifact** — exported on `bf sync`, committed to git, one entry per bead. Used for backup, cross-machine sharing, and recovery. Never written during normal operation.\n13\t3. **Drop-in CLI** — all `br` commands work under `bf` with the same flags and output formats\n14\t4. **`BEGIN IMMEDIATE` for atomic claim** — the read-score-update sequence runs inside a single SQLite write transaction, eliminating the race condition `br` has without requiring flock or a daemon\n15\t\n16\t---\n17\t\n18\t## Phase 1: Core Library — Data Model & JSONL Import/Export\n19\t\n20\t### 1.1 Data Model (`src/model.rs`)\n21\t\n22\tPort the exact `Issue`, `Status`, `Priority`, `IssueType`, `Dependency`, `DependencyType`, `Comment`, and `Event` structs from beads_rust with identical Serde attributes. This is the wire format — every field, every `skip_serializing_if`, every rename must match.\n23\t\n24\tKey structs and their JSONL serialization:\n25\t\n26\t```\n27\tStatus:       open | in_progress | blocked | deferred | draft | closed | tombstone | pinned | Custom(String)\n28\tPriority:     transparent i32 (0=Critical, 4=Backlog)\n29\tIssueType:    task | bug | feature | epic | chore | docs | question | Custom(String)\n30\tDependency:   { issue_id, depends_on_id, type (renamed from dep_type), created_at, created_by?, metadata?, thread_id? }\n31\tComment:      { id: i64, issue_id, author, text (renamed from body), created_at }\n32\tEvent:        { id: i64, issue_id, event_type, actor, old_value?, new_value?, comment?, created_at }\n33\t```\n34\t\n35\tIssue fields (alphabetical by JSON key):\n36\t```\n37\tid, title, description?, design?, acceptance_criteria?, notes?,\n38\tstatus, priority, issue_type, assignee?, owner?, estimated_minutes?,\n39\tcreated_at, created_by?, updated_at, closed_at?, close_reason?,\n40\tclosed_by_session?, due_at?, defer_until?, external_ref?,\n41\tsource_system?, source_repo, deleted_at?, deleted_by?, delete_reason?,\n42\toriginal_type?, compaction_level (default 0), compacted_at?,\n43\tcompacted_at_commit?, original_size?, sender?, ephemeral (default false),\n44\tpinned (default false), is_template (default false),\n45\tlabels: Vec<String>, dependencies: Vec<Dependency>, comments: Vec<Comment>\n46\t```\n47\t\n48\t### 1.2 JSONL Import (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n49\t\n50\tJSONL is read only during `bf sync --import` (pulling state from git) and `bf doctor --repair` (rebuilding SQLite from the artifact). Never read during normal CLI operation.\n51\t\n52\t```rust\n53\tfn import_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ImportResult> {\n54\t    let file = File::open(jsonl_path)?;\n55\t    let reader = BufReader::new(file);\n56\t    storage.with_write_transaction(|tx| {\n57\t        for line in reader.lines() {\n58\t            let issue: Issue = serde_json::from_str(&line?)?;\n59\t            tx.upsert_issue(&issue)?;\n60\t        }\n61\t        Ok(())\n62\t    })\n63\t}\n64\t```\n65\t\n66\tFunctions:\n67\t- `import_jsonl(path, storage)` — bulk upsert from JSONL into SQLite\n68\t- `stream_issues(path) -> impl Iterator<Item = Result<Issue>>` — lazy line iterator (used by import and doctor)\n69\t\n70\t### 1.3 JSONL Export (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n71\t\n72\tJSONL is written only during `bf sync --flush` (preparing the git artifact). Exports current bead state from SQLite, one entry per bead, sorted by ID for stable diffs. Atomic temp+rename.\n73\t\n74\t```rust\n75\tfn export_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ExportResult> {\n76\t    let issues = storage.list_all_issues()?;  // sorted by ID\n77\t    let temp_path = jsonl_path.with_extension(\"jsonl.tmp\");\n78\t    let mut writer = BufWriter::new(File::create_new(&temp_path)?);\n79\t    for issue in &issues {\n80\t        serde_json::to_writer(&mut writer, issue)?;\n81\t        writer.write_all(b\"\\n\")?;\n82\t    }\n83\t    writer.flush()?;\n84\t    drop(writer);\n85\t    fs::rename(&temp_path, jsonl_path)?;\n86\t    Ok(ExportResult { count: issues.len() })\n87\t}\n88\t```\n89\t\n90\tFunctions:\n91\t- `export_jsonl(path, storage)` — dump all beads from SQLite to JSONL (atomic)\n92\t- `export_jsonl_dirty(path, storage)` — export only dirty beads (incremental, faster for large workspaces)\n93\t\n94\t### 1.4 Config (`src/config.rs`)\n95\t\n96\tParse `.beads/config.yaml` with the same fields br uses:\n97\t\n98\t```yaml\n99\tissue_prefixes: [bd, fg]\n100\tdefault_priority: 2\n101\tdefault_type: task\n102\tscoring:\n103\t  priority_weight: 0.4\n104\t  blockers_weight: 0.3\n105\t  age_weight: 0.2\n106\t  labels_weight: 0.1\n107\t  max_age_hours: 20\n108\t  max_blockers: 3\n109\t# bead-forge additions (additive, br ignores these)\n110\tclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n111\t```\n112\t\n113\tParse `.beads/metadata.json`:\n114\t```json\n115\t{ \"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\" }\n116\t```\n117\t\n118\t### 1.5 ID Generation (`src/id.rs`)\n119\t\n120\tPort br's ID scheme: `<prefix>-<hash>` where hash is base36 lowercase. Use the birthday-problem adaptive length (3-8 chars). Read `issue_prefixes` from config (first entry is the default prefix).\n121\t\n122\t```rust\n123\tfn generate_id(prefix: &str, existing_count: usize) -> String {\n124\t    let len = optimal_hash_length(existing_count);\n125\t    let random_bytes = rand::random::<[u8; 16]>();\n126\t    let hash = sha256(&random_bytes);\n127\t    base36_encode(&hash[..len])\n128\t    format!(\"{}-{}\", prefix, hash)\n129\t}\n130\t```\n131\t\n132\t---\n133\t\n134\t## Phase 2: SQLite Primary Store\n135\t\n136\t### 2.1 Schema Application (`src/storage/schema.rs`)\n137\t\n138\tApply the exact same `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` DDL from br's `SCHEMA_SQL`. JSONL is never touched during normal operation.\n164\t\n165\tFunctions:\n166\t- `open(path: &Path) -> Result<Storage>` — open/create DB, apply schema\n167\t- `get_issue(id: &str) -> Result<Option<Issue>>` — point lookup by ID\n168\t- `list_issues(filter: IssueFilter) -> Result<Vec<Issue>>` — filtered query with WHERE clauses\n169\t- `list_all_issues() -> Result<Vec<Issue>>` — full table scan sorted by ID (for JSONL export)\n170\t- `create_issue(issue: &Issue) -> Result<()>` — INSERT\n171\t- `update_issue(id: &str, changes: IssueChanges) -> Result<()>` — UPDATE + mark dirty\n172\t- `close_issue(id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()>` — status transition + mark dirty\n173\t- `with_write_transaction(f) -> Result<T>` — execute closure in a write transaction\n174\t- `with_immediate_transaction(f) -> Result<T>` — `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` with retry (see §2.5) — acquires write lock before any reads (used by claim)\n175\t- `rebuild_blocked_cache() -> Result<()>` — recalculate blocked issues materialized view\n176\t\n177\t### 2.3 Sync Protocol (`src/sync.rs`)\n178\t\n179\tPort br's sync semantics:\n180\t\n181\t**Flush (SQLite → JSONL, for git)**:\n182\t1. With claim latency of ~1-2ms and a 20-worker fleet, the entire queue clears in ~20-40ms, so `SQLITE_BUSY` should never occur in normal operation. SQLite is the live database — all reads and writes go through it. `issues.jsonl` is a git-synced artifact exported on demand: one entry per bead, committed to the repo for backup, sharing, and recovery. Concurrent claiming is handled by SQLite's `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` transaction — no server, no daemon, no flock required.\n\n## Core Principles\n\n1. **SQLite is the live store** — all mutations are SQL writes; reads are SQL queries. Fast, concurrent-read, serialized-write via WAL mode.\n2. **JSONL is the git artifact** — exported on `bf sync`, committed to git, one entry per bead. Used for backup, cross-machine sharing, and recovery. Never written during normal operation.\n3. **Drop-in CLI** — all `br` commands work under `bf` with the same flags and output formats\n4. **`BEGIN IMMEDIATE` for atomic claim** — the read-score-update sequence runs inside a single SQLite write transaction, eliminating the race condition `br` has without requiring flock or a daemon\n\n---\n\n## Phase 1: Core Library — Data Model & JSONL Import/Export\n\n### 1.1 Data Model (`src/model.rs`)\n\nPort the exact `Issue`, `Status`, `Priority`, `IssueType`, `Dependency`, `DependencyType`, `Comment`, and `Event` structs from beads_rust with identical Serde attributes. This is the wire format — every field, every `skip_serializing_if`, every rename must match.\n\nKey structs and their JSONL serialization:\n\n```\nStatus:       open | in_progress | blocked | deferred | draft | closed | tombstone | pinned | Custom(String)\nPriority:     transparent i32 (0=Critical, 4=Backlog)\nIssueType:    task | bug | feature | epic | chore | docs | question | Custom(String)\nDependency:   { issue_id, depends_on_id, type (renamed from dep_type), created_at, created_by?, metadata?, thread_id? }\nComment:      { id: i64, issue_id, author, text (renamed from body), created_at }\nEvent:        { id: i64, issue_id, event_type, actor, old_value?, new_value?, comment?, created_at }\n```\n\nIssue fields (alphabetical by JSON key):\n```\nid, title, description?, design?, acceptance_criteria?, notes?,\nstatus, priority, issue_type, assignee?, owner?, estimated_minutes?,\ncreated_at, created_by?, updated_at, closed_at?, close_reason?,\nclosed_by_session?, due_at?, defer_until?, external_ref?,\nsource_system?, source_repo, deleted_at?, deleted_by?, delete_reason?,\noriginal_type?, compaction_level (default 0), compacted_at?,\ncompacted_at_commit?, original_size?, sender?, ephemeral (default false),\npinned (default false), is_template (default false),\nlabels: Vec<String>, dependencies: Vec<Dependency>, comments: Vec<Comment>\n```\n\n### 1.2 JSONL Import (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n\nJSONL is read only during `bf sync --import` (pulling state from git) and `bf doctor --repair` (rebuilding SQLite from the artifact). Never read during normal CLI operation.\n\n```rust\nfn import_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ImportResult> {\n    let file = File::open(jsonl_path)?;\n    let reader = BufReader::new(file);\n    storage.with_write_transaction(|tx| {\n        for line in reader.lines() {\n            let issue: Issue = serde_json::from_str(&line?)?;\n            tx.upsert_issue(&issue)?;\n        }\n        Ok(())\n    })\n}\n```\n\nFunctions:\n- `import_jsonl(path, storage)` — bulk upsert from JSONL into SQLite\n- `stream_issues(path) -> impl Iterator<Item = Result<Issue>>` — lazy line iterator (used by import and doctor)\n\n### 1.3 JSONL Export (`src/jsonl.rs`)\n\nJSONL is written only during `bf sync --flush` (preparing the git artifact). Exports current bead state from SQLite, one entry per bead, sorted by ID for stable diffs. Atomic temp+rename.\n\n```rust\nfn export_jsonl(jsonl_path: &Path, storage: &Storage) -> Result<ExportResult> {\n    let issues = storage.list_all_issues()?;  // sorted by ID\n    let temp_path = jsonl_path.with_extension(\"jsonl.tmp\");\n    let mut writer = BufWriter::new(File::create_new(&temp_path)?);\n    for issue in &issues {\n        serde_json::to_writer(&mut writer, issue)?;\n        writer.write_all(b\"\\n\")?;\n    }\n    writer.flush()?;\n    drop(writer);\n    fs::rename(&temp_path, jsonl_path)?;\n    Ok(ExportResult { count: issues.len() })\n}\n```\n\nFunctions:\n- `export_jsonl(path, storage)` — dump all beads from SQLite to JSONL (atomic)\n- `export_jsonl_dirty(path, storage)` — export only dirty beads (incremental, faster for large workspaces)\n\n### 1.4 Config (`src/config.rs`)\n\nParse `.beads/config.yaml` with the same fields br uses:\n\n```yaml\nissue_prefixes: [bd, fg]\ndefault_priority: 2\ndefault_type: task\nscoring:\n  priority_weight: 0.4\n  blockers_weight: 0.3\n  age_weight: 0.2\n  labels_weight: 0.1\n  max_age_hours: 20\n  max_blockers: 3\n# bead-forge additions (additive, br ignores these)\nclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n```\n\nParse `.beads/metadata.json`:\n```json\n{ \"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\" }\n```\n\n### 1.5 ID Generation (`src/id.rs`)\n\nPort br's ID scheme: `<prefix>-<hash>` where hash is base36 lowercase. Use the birthday-problem adaptive length (3-8 chars). Read `issue_prefixes` from config (first entry is the default prefix).\n\n```rust\nfn generate_id(prefix: &str, existing_count: usize) -> String {\n    let len = optimal_hash_length(existing_count);\n    let random_bytes = rand::random::<[u8; 16]>();\n    let hash = sha256(&random_bytes);\n    base36_encode(&hash[..len])\n    format!(\"{}-{}\", prefix, hash)\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: SQLite Primary Store\n\n### 2.1 Schema Application (`src/storage/schema.rs`)\n\nApply the exact same `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` DDL from br's `SCHEMA_SQL`. Tables:\n\n| Table | Purpose |\n|-------|---------|\n| `issues` | All 35 columns, same types, defaults, CHECK constraints |\n| `dependencies` | (issue_id, depends_on_id) PK, type, metadata, thread_id |\n| `labels` | (issue_id, label) PK |\n| `comments` | AUTOINCREMENT id, issue_id, author, text, created_at |\n| `events` | AUTOINCREMENT id, issue_id, event_type, actor, old/new/comment |\n| `config` | key-value |\n| `metadata` | key-value |\n| `dirty_issues` | Track which issues need JSONL export |\n| `export_hashes` | Incremental export tracking |\n| `blocked_issues_cache` | Materialized view of blocked issues |\n| `child_counters` | Hierarchical IDs (bd-abc.1, bd-abc.2) |\n| `recovery_sessions` | Anomaly/recovery audit trail |\n| `anomaly_audit` | Recovery event tracking |\n| `bead_annotations` | bf-only: arbitrary key-value metadata per bead; separate table so br's `rebuild_issues_table()` never touches it |\n\nAll indexes from br must be created identically, including the critical `idx_issues_ready` composite partial index.\n\n### 2.2 Storage Engine (`src/storage/sqlite.rs`)\n\nUse `rusqlite` (not FrankenSQLite) bundled with system SQLite. Apply WAL mode, foreign keys, busy_timeout=30s, cache_size=-8000, synchronous=NORMAL.\n\nAll mutations go through here. JSONL is never touched during normal operation.\n\nFunctions:\n- `open(path: &Path) -> Result<Storage>` — open/create DB, apply schema\n- `get_issue(id: &str) -> Result<Option<Issue>>` — point lookup by ID\n- `list_issues(filter: IssueFilter) -> Result<Vec<Issue>>` — filtered query with WHERE clauses\n- `list_all_issues() -> Result<Vec<Issue>>` — full table scan sorted by ID (for JSONL export)\n- `create_issue(issue: &Issue) -> Result<()>` — INSERT\n- `update_issue(id: &str, changes: IssueChanges) -> Result<()>` — UPDATE + mark dirty\n- `close_issue(id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()>` — status transition + mark dirty\n- `with_write_transaction(f) -> Result<T>` — execute closure in a write transaction\n- `with_immediate_transaction(f) -> Result<T>` — `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` with retry (see §2.5) — acquires write lock before any reads (used by claim)\n- `rebuild_blocked_cache() -> Result<()>` — recalculate blocked issues materialized view\n\n### 2.3 Sync Protocol (`src/sync.rs`)\n\nPort br's sync semantics:\n\n**Flush (SQLite → JSONL, for git)**:\n1. Call `export_jsonl_dirty` — query dirty bead IDs, export full current state of each from SQLite\n2. Atomic temp+rename over `issues.jsonl`\n3. Clear `dirty_issues`, update `export_hashes`\n\nFor `bf sync` (full flush): call `export_jsonl` — dump all beads sorted by ID, unconditionally.\n\n**Import (JSONL → SQLite, from git pull)**:\n1. Stream `issues.jsonl` line by line\n2. Compare each with SQLite state using `content_hash`\n3. INSERT new, UPDATE changed, SKIP unchanged\n4. Handle collisions (same ID, different content) with deterministic resolution\n\n### 2.5 Concurrent Write Safety (`src/storage/sqlite.rs`)\n\nSQLite WAL mode serializes concurrent writers through a single write lock — they queue, not corrupt. `SQLITE_BUSY` is returned when a writer cannot acquire the lock within `busy_timeout`. With claim latency of ~1-2ms and a 20-worker fleet, the entire queue clears in ~20-40ms, so `SQLITE_BUSY` should never occur in normal operation. However, a retry wrapper is the cheap safety net that makes this a guarantee rather than an assumption:\n\n```rust\nconst MAX_RETRIES: u32 = 5;\nconst RETRY_BASE_MS: u64 = 50;","numLines":200,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1560}}}

/// Output format (text, json, toon)\n91\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n92\t        format: String,\n93\t\n94\t        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n95\t        #[arg(long)]\n96\t        json: bool,\n97\t    },\n98\t\n99\t    /// Update a bead\n100\t    Update {\n101\t        /// Bead ID\n102\t        id: String,\n103\t\n104\t        /// New title\n105\t        #[arg(long)]\n106\t        title: Option<String>,\n107\t\n108\t        /// New status\n109\t        #[arg(long)]\n110\t        status: Option<String>,\n111\t\n112\t        /// New priority\n113\t        #[arg(long)]\n114\t        priority: Option<i32>,\n115\t\n116\t        /// New assignee\n117\t        #[arg(long)]\n118\t        assignee: Option<String>,\n119\t    },\n120\t\n121\t    /// Close a bead\n122\t    Close {\n123\t        /// Bead ID\n124\t        id: String,\n125\t\n126\t        /// Close reason\n127\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"Completed\")]\n128\t        reason: String,\n129\t    },\n130\t\n131\t    /// Reopen a bead\n132\t    Reopen {\n133\t        /// Bead ID\n134\t        id: String,\n135\t    },\n136\t\n137\t    /// Delete a bead\n138\t    Delete {\n139\t        /// Bead ID\n140\t        id: String,\n141\t    },\n142\t\n143\t    /// Show ready (unblocked) beads\n144\t    Ready {\n145\t        /// Limit results (0 = unlimited)\n146\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"10\")]\n147\t        limit: usize,\n148\t\n149\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n150\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n151\t        format: String,\n152\t\n153\t        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n154\t        #[arg(long)]\n155\t        json: bool,\n156\t    },\n157\t\n158\t    /// Claim a bead (atomic)\n159\t    Claim {\n160\t        /// Assignee (worker ID)\n161\t        #[arg(long)]\n162\t        assignee: String,\n163\t\n164\t        /// Model\n165\t        #[arg(long)]\n166\t        model: Option<String>,\n167\t\n168\t        /// Harness\n169\t        #[arg(long)]\n170\t        harness: Option<String>,\n171\t\n172\t        /// Harness version\n173\t        #[arg(long)]\n174\t        harness_version: Option<String>,\n175\t\n176\t        /// Claim from any workspace (searches all .beads/ directories)\n177\t        #[arg(long)]\n178\t        any: bool,\n179\t\n180\t        /// Fallback mode: try current workspace first, fall back to any if no beads available\n181\t        #[arg(long)]\n182\t        fallback: bool,\n183\t\n184\t        /// Workspace paths to search (only used with --any)\n185\t        #[arg(long)]\n186\t        workspace_paths: Vec<PathBuf>,\n187\t\n188\t        /// Dry run (show what would be claimed without claiming)\n189\t        #[arg(long)]\n190\t        dry_run: bool,\n191\t\n192\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n193\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n194\t        format: String,\n195\t\n196\t        /// Output JSON (alias for --format json)\n197\t        #[arg(long)]\n198\t        json: bool,\n199\t    },\n200\t\n201\t    /// Initialize a new workspace\n202\t    Init {\n203\t        /// Issue prefix\n204\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"bf\")]\n205\t        prefix: String,\n206\t    },\n207\t\n208\t    /// Sync (flush to JSONL or import from JSONL)\n209\t    Sync {\n210\t        /// Flush only (SQLite -> JSONL)\n211\t        #[arg(long)]\n212\t        flush_only: bool,\n213\t\n214\t        /// Import only (JSONL -> SQLite)\n215\t        #[arg(long)]\n216\t        import_only: bool,\n217\t    },\n218\t\n219\t    /// Doctor - check and repair\n220\t    Doctor {\n221\t        /// Repair database\n222\t        #[arg(long)]\n223\t        repair: bool,\n224\t    },\n225\t\n226\t    /// Count beads\n227\t    Count {\n228\t        /// Filter by status\n229\t        #[arg(long)]\n230\t        status: Option<String>,\n231\t    },\n232\t\n233\t    /// Batch operations (atomic)\n234\t    Batch {\n235\t        /// JSON file containing operations\n236\t        #[arg(long)]\n237\t        file: Option<PathBuf>,\n238\t\n239\t        /// JSON string containing operations\n240\t        #[arg(long)]\n241\t        json: Option<String>,\n242\t\n243\t        /// Read from stdin\n244\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"false\")]\n245\t        stdin: bool,\n246\t    },\n247\t\n248\t    /// Mitosis: split a bead into children atomically\n249\t    Mitosis {\n250\t        /// Parent bead ID to split\n251\t        id: String,\n252\t\n253\t        /// Child bead definitions (JSON array of {title, type, priority})\n254\t        #[arg(long)]\n255\t        children: String,\n256\t\n257\t        /// Close reason for parent bead\n258\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"Split into children\")]\n259\t        reason: String,\n260\t\n261\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n262\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n263\t        format: String,\n264\t    },\n265\t\n266\t    /// Manage dependencies\n267\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n268\t    Dep(DepCommands),\n269\t\n270\t    /// Manage labels\n271\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n272\t    Label(LabelCommands),\n273\t\n274\t    /// List labels for a specific issue (direct SELECT, efficient)\n275\t    Labels {\n276\t        /// Bead ID\n277\t        id: String,\n278\t\n279\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n280\t        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"text\")]\n281\t        format: String,\n282\t    },\n283\t\n284\t    /// Manage comments\n285\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n286\t    Comments(CommentsCommands),\n287\t\n288\t    /// Search beads\n289\t    Search {\n290\t        /// Search query\n291\t        query: Option<String>,\n292\t\n293\t        /// Filter by status\n294\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n295\t        status: Vec<String>,\n296\t\n297\t        /// Filter by type\n298\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n299\t        type_: Vec<String>,\n300\t\n301\t        /// Filter by assignee\n302\t        #[arg(long)]\n303\t        assignee: Option<String>,\n304\t\n305\t        /// Filter by label\n306\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n307\t        label: Vec<String>,\n308\t\n309\t        /// Filter by minimum priority\n310\t        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MIN\")]\n311\t        priority_min: Option<i32>,\n312\t\n313\t        /// Filter by maximum priority\n314\t        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MAX\")]\n315\t        priority_max: Option<i32>,\n316\t\n317\t        /// Limit results\n318\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"50\")]\n319\t        limit: usize,\n320\t\n321\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n322\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n323\t        format: String,\n324\t    },\n325\t\n326\t    /// Show statistics\n327\t    Stats {\n328\t        /// Show breakdown by type\n329\t        #[arg(long)]\n330\t        by_type: bool,\n331\t\n332\t        /// Show breakdown by priority\n333\t        #[arg(long)]\n334\t        by_priority: bool,\n335\t\n336\t        /// Show breakdown by assignee\n337\t        #[arg(long)]\n338\t        by_assignee: bool,\n339\t\n340\t        /// Show breakdown by label\n341\t        #[arg(long)]\n342\t        by_label: bool,\n343\t\n344\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n345\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n346\t        format: String,\n347\t    },\n348\t\n349\t    /// Emit JSON Schema\n350\t    Schema {\n351\t        /// Schema target\n352\t        #[arg(default_value = \"all\")]\n353\t        target: String,\n354\t\n355\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n356\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"json\")]\n357\t        format: String,\n358\t    },\n359\t\n360\t    /// Configuration management\n361\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n362\t    Config(ConfigCommands),\n363\t\n364\t    /// Show velocity stats (bead-forge specific)\n365\t    Velocity {\n366\t        /// Model\n367\t        #[arg(long)]\n368\t        model: Option<String>,\n369\t\n370\t        /// Harness\n371\t        #[arg(long)]\n372\t        harness: Option<String>,\n373\t\n374\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n375\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n376\t        format: String,\n377\t    },\n378\t\n379\t    /// Manage annotations\n380\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n381\t    Annotate(AnnotateCommands),\n382\t\n383\t    /// Show event log for a bead\n384\t    Log {\n385\t        /// Bead ID\n386\t        id: String,\n387\t\n388\t        /// Limit number of entries\n389\t        #[arg(long)]\n390\t        limit: Option<usize>,\n391\t\n392\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n393\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n394\t        format: String,\n395\t    },\n396\t\n397\t    /// Show critical path (longest chain of blocking dependencies)\n398\t    CriticalPath {\n399\t        /// Root bead ID\n400\t        id: String,\n401\t\n402\t        /// Maximum depth\n403\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"20\")]\n404\t        max_depth: usize,\n405\t\n406\t        /// Output format (text, json, toon)\n407\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n408\t        format: String,\n409\t    },\n410\t\n411\t    /// Rotate (archive) closed beads older than threshold\n412\t    Rotate {\n413\t        /// Days threshold (archive beads closed this many days ago)\n414\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"30\")]\n415\t        days: u64,\n416\t\n417\t        /// Dry run (show what would be rotated)\n418\t        #[arg(long)]\n419\t        dry_run: bool,\n420\t    },\n421\t}\n422\t\n423\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n424\tpub enum DepCommands {\n425\t    /// Add a dependency\n426\t    Add {\n427\t        /// Issue ID (the one that will depend on something)\n428\t        issue: String,\n429\t\n430\t        /// Target issue ID (the one being depended on)\n431\t        depends_on: String,\n432\t\n433\t        /// Dependency type\n434\t        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"blocks\")]\n435\t        type_: String,\n436\t    },\n437\t\n438\t    /// Remove a dependency\n439\t    Remove {\n440\t        /// Issue ID\n441\t        issue: String,\n442\t\n443\t        /// Target issue ID to remove dependency to\n444\t        depends_on: String,\n445\t    },\n446\t\n447\t    /// List dependencies of an issue\n448\t    List {\n449\t        /// Issue ID\n450\t        id: String,\n451\t    },\n452\t\n453\t    /// Show dependency tree rooted at issue\n454\t    Tree {\n455\t        /// Issue ID (root of tree)\n456\t        id: String,\n457\t\n458\t        /// Tree direction (down, up, both)\n459\t        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"down\")]\n460\t        direction: String,\n461\t\n462\t        /// Maximum depth\n463\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"10\")]\n464\t        max_depth: usize,\n465\t    },\n466\t}\n467\t\n468\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n469\tpub enum LabelCommands {\n470\t    /// Add label(s) to an issue\n471\t    Add {\n472\t        /// Issue ID\n473\t        id: String,\n474\t\n475\t        /// Label(s) to add (multiple labels supported)\n476\t        #[arg(short, long, required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n477\t        label: Vec<String>,\n478\t    },\n479\t\n480\t    /// Remove label(s) from an issue\n481\t    Remove {\n482\t        /// Issue ID\n483\t        id: String,\n484\t\n485\t        /// Label(s) to remove (multiple labels supported)\n486\t        #[arg(short, long, required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n487\t        label: Vec<String>,\n488\t    },\n489\t\n490\t    /// List labels for an issue or all unique labels\n491\t    List {\n492\t        /// Issue ID (optional - if omitted, lists all unique labels)\n493\t        id: Option<String>,\n494\t    },\n495\t}\n496\t\n497\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n498\tpub enum CommentsCommands {\n499\t    /// Add a comment\n500\t    Add {\n501\t        /// Issue ID\n502\t        id: String,\n503\t\n504\t        /// Comment text\n505\t        #[arg(required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n506\t        text: Vec<String>,\n507\t    },\n508\t\n509\t    /// List comments for an issue\n510\t    List {\n511\t        /// Issue ID\n512\t        id: String,\n513\t    },\n514\t}\n515\t\n516\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n517\tpub enum ConfigCommands {\n518\t    /// List all config values\n519\t    List,\n520\t\n521\t    /// Get a specific config value\n522\t    Get {\n523\t        /// Config key\n524\t        key: String,\n525\t    },\n526\t\n527\t    /// Show config file path\n528\t    Path,\n529\t}\n530\t\n531\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n532\tpub enum AnnotateCommands {\n533\t    /// Set an annotation\n534\t    Set {\n535\t        /// Issue ID\n536\t        id: String,\n537\t\n538\t        /// Annotation key\n539\t        key: String,\n540\t\n541\t        /// Annotation value\n542\t        value: String,\n543\t    },\n544\t\n545\t    /// Get an annotation\n546\t    Get {\n547\t        /// Issue ID\n548\t        id: String,\n549\t\n550\t        /// Annotation key\n551\t        key: String,\n552\t    },\n553\t\n554\t    /// Remove an annotation\n555\t    Remove {\n556\t        /// Issue ID\n557\t        id: String,\n558\t\n559\t        /// Annotation key\n560\t        key: String,\n561\t    },\n562\t\n563\t    /// List all annotations for an issue\n564\t    List {\n565\t        /// Issue ID\n566\t        id: String,\n567\t    },\n568\t\n569\t    /// Clear all annotations for an issue\n570\t    Clear {\n571\t        /// Issue ID\n572\t        id: String,\n573\t    },\n574\t}\n575\t\n576\tpub fn run_cli() -> Result<Cli> {\n577\t    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n578\t}\n579\t\n580\tpub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n581\t    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n582\t\n583\t    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n584\t    match &cli.command {\n585\t        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n586\t            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n587\t            return match cli.command {\n588\t                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n589\t                _ => unreachable!(),\n590\t            };\n591\t        }\n592\t        _ => {}\n593\t    }\n594\t\n595\t    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n596\t        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n597\t\n598\t    match cli.command {\n599\t        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n600\t        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n601\t            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n602\t        }\n603\t        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format, json } => {\n604\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n605\t            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n606\t        }\n607\t        Commands::Show { id, format, json } => {\n608\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n609\t            cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format)\n610\t        }\n611\t        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n612\t            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n613\t        }\n614\t        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n615\t        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n616\t        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n617\t        Commands::Ready { limit, format, json } => {\n618\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n619\t            cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format)\n620\t        }\n621\t        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, workspace_paths, dry_run, format, json } => {\n622\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n623\t            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, &workspace_paths, dry_run, &format)\n624\t        }\n625\t        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n626\t        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n627\t        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n628\t        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n629\t        Commands::Mitosis { id, children, reason, format } => cmd_mitosis(&beads_dir, &id, &children, &reason, &format),\n630\t        Commands::Dep(dep) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep),\n631\t        Commands::Label(label) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label),\n632\t        Commands::Comments(comments) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments),\n633\t        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n634\t            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n635\t        }\n636\t        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n637\t            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n638\t        }\n639\t        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n640\t        Commands::Config(config) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config),\n641\t        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n642\t        Commands::Labels { id, format } => cmd_labels(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n643\t        Commands::Annotate(annotate) => cmd_annotate(&beads_dir, annotate),\n644\t        Commands::Log { id, limit, format } => cmd_log(&beads_dir, &id, limit, &format),\n645\t        Commands::CriticalPath { id, max_depth, format } => cmd_critical_path(&beads_dir, &id, max_depth, &format),\n646\t        Commands::Rotate { days, dry_run } => cmd_rotate(&beads_dir, days, dry_run),\n647\t    }\n648\t}\n649\t\n650\tfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n651\t    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n652\t\n653\t    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n654\t    if !config_path.exists() {\n655\t        let config = format!(\n656\t            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\n657\tdefault_priority: 2\n658\tdefault_type: task\n659\tclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n660\t\"#,\n661\t            prefix\n662\t        );\n663\t        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n664\t    }\n665\t\n666\t    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n667\t    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n668\t        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n669\t        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n670\t    }\n671\t\n672\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n673\t    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n674\t\n675\t    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n676\t    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n677\t        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n678\t    }\n679\t\n680\t    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n681\t    Ok(())\n682\t}\n683\t\n684\tfn cmd_create(\n685\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n686\t    title: String,\n687\t    type_: String,\n688\t    priority: i32,\n689\t    description: Option<String>,\n690\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n691\t    labels: Vec<String>,\n692\t) -> Result<()> {\n693\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n694\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n695\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n696\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n697\t\n698\t    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n699\t    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n700\t    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n701\t\n702\t    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n703\t    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n704\t    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n705\t    issue.description = description;\n706\t    issue.assignee = assignee;\n707\t    issue.labels = labels;\n708\t\n709\t    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n710\t\n711\t    println!(\"{}\", id);\n712\t    Ok(())\n713\t}\n714\t\n715\tfn cmd_list(\n716\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n717\t    status: Option<String>,\n718\t    type_: Option<String>,\n719\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n720\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n721\t    limit: Option<usize>,\n722\t    format: &str,\n723\t) -> Result<()> {\n724\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n725\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n726\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n727\t\n728\t    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n729\t    if let Some(s) = status {\n730\t        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n731\t    }\n732\t    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n733\t        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n734\t    }\n735\t    filter.assignee = assignee;\n736\t    filter.priority = priority;\n737\t    // --limit 0 means unlimited\n738\t    filter.limit = limit.and_then(|l| if l == 0 { None } else { Some(l) });\n739\t\n740\t    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n741\t\n742\t    let output_format = OutputFormat::from_str(format).unwrap_or(OutputFormat::Text);\n743\t    let formatter = get_formatter(output_format);\n744\t    print!(\"{}\", formatter.format_issues(&issues));\n745\t\n746\t    Ok(())\n747\t}\n748\t\n749\tfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n750\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n751\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n752\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n753\t\n754\t    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n755\t\n756\t    match format {\n757\t        \"json\" => {\n758\t            // Strip dependencies/comments before serializing: NEEDLE's BrDependency\n759\t            // format ({id, title, status, priority, dependency_type}) differs from\n760\t            // bead-forge's Dependency format ({issue_id, depends_on_id, type, ...}).\n761\t            // NEEDLE has #[serde(default)] on the deps field so empty is fine.\n762\t            let mut out = issue;\n763\t            out.dependencies = vec![];\n764\t            out.comments = vec![];\n765\t            // Wrap in array so NEEDLE's parse_single_bead (Vec<Bead> → first) works.\n766\t            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&vec![out])?);\n767\t        }\n768\t        \"toon\" => {\n769\t            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n770\t            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n771\t            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n772\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n773\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n774\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n775\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n776\t            }\n777\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n778\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n779\t            }\n780\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n781\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n782\t            }\n783\t        }\n784\t        _ => {\n785\t            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n786\t            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n787\t            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n788\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n789\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n790\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n791\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n792\t            }\n793\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n794\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n795\t            }\n796\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n797\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n798\t            }\n799\t        }\n800\t    }\n801\t\n802\t    Ok(())\n803\t}\n804\t\n805\tfn cmd_update(\n806\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n807\t    id: &str,\n808\t    title: Option<String>,\n809\t    status: Option<String>,\n810\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n811\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n812\t) -> Result<()> {\n813\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n814\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n815\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n816\t\n817\t    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n818\t        title,\n819\t        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n820\t        priority,\n821\t        assignee,\n822\t        ..Default::default()\n823\t    };\n824\t\n825\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n826\t    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n827\t    Ok(())\n828\t}\n829\t\n830\tfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n831\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n832\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n833\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n834\t\n835\t    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n836\t    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n837\t    Ok(())\n838\t}\n839\t\n840\tfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n841\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n842\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n843\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n844\t\n845\t    let changes = IssueChanges {\n846\t        status: Some(Status::Open),\n847\t        ..Default::default()\n848\t    };\n849\t\n850\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n851\t    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n852\t    Ok(())\n853\t}\n854\t\n855\tfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n856\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n857\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n858\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n859\t\n860\t    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n861\t        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n862\t        Ok(())\n863\t    })?;\n864\t\n865\t    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n866\t    Ok(())\n867\t}\n868\t\n869\tfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n870\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n871\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n872\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n873\t\n874\t    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n875\t        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n876\t    })?;\n877\t\n878\t    match format {\n879\t        \"json\" => {\n880\t            for candidate in candidates {\n881\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n882\t            }\n883\t        }\n884\t        \"toon\" => {\n885\t            for candidate in candidates {\n886\t                println!(\"{}\", crate::format::toon::format_ready_bead(\n887\t                    &candidate.id,\n888\t                    &candidate.title,\n889\t                    candidate.priority,\n890\t                    candidate.downstream_impact,\n891\t                    999999, // float - will be computed properly later\n892\t                ));\n893\t            }\n894\t        }\n895\t        _ => {\n896\t            for candidate in candidates {\n897\t                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n898\t                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n899\t                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n900\t            }\n901\t        }\n902\t    }\n903\t\n904\t    Ok(())\n905\t}\n906\t\n907\tfn cmd_claim(\n908\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n909\t    assignee: &str,\n910\t    model: Option<String>,\n911\t    harness: Option<String>,\n912\t    harness_version: Option<String>,\n913\t    any: bool,\n914\t    fallback: bool,\n915\t    workspace_paths: &[PathBuf],\n916\t    dry_run: bool,\n917\t    format: &str,\n918\t) -> Result<()> {\n919\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n920\t    let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n921\t\n922\t    // Build worker metadata\n923\t    let worker_metadata = WorkerMetadata {\n924\t        worker_id: assignee.to_string(),\n925\t        model: model.clone(),\n926\t        harness: harness.clone(),\n927\t        harness_version: harness_version.clone(),\n928\t    };\n929\t\n930\t    if dry_run {\n931\t        // Dry run mode - show what would be claimed\n932\t        let candidates: Vec<(PathBuf, crate::claim::ScoredBead)> = if any || fallback {\n933\t            // Multi-workspace dry run\n934\t            let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n935\t                // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n936\t                find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n937\t            } else {\n938\t                workspace_paths.to_vec()\n939\t            };\n940\t\n941\t            let mut all_candidates = Vec::new();\n942\t            for path in &paths {\n943\t                let local_beads_dir = path.join(\".beads\");\n944\t                if local_beads_dir.exists() {\n945\t                    let local_metadata = match load_metadata(&local_beads_dir) {\n946\t                        Ok(m) => m,\n947\t                        Err(_) => continue,\n948\t                    };\n949\t                    let local_db_path = local_beads_dir.join(&local_metadata.database);\n950\t                    if let Ok(local_storage) = Storage::open(&local_db_path) {\n951\t                        if let Ok(local_candidates) = local_storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n952\t                            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n953\t                        }) {\n954\t                            for c in local_candidates {\n955\t                                all_candidates.push((path.clone(), c));\n956\t                            }\n957\t                        }\n958\t                    }\n959\t                }\n960\t            }\n961\t\n962\t            // Sort by score and take top 1\n963\t            all_candidates.sort_by(|a, b| {\n964\t                let score_a = (b.1.downstream_impact, b.1.priority, b.1.created_at.clone());\n965\t                let score_b = (a.1.downstream_impact, a.1.priority, a.1.created_at.clone());\n966\t                score_a.cmp(&score_b)\n967\t            });\n968\t            all_candidates.into_iter().take(1).collect()\n969\t        } else {\n970\t            // Single workspace dry run\n971\t            let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n972\t            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n973\t            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n974\t            let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n975\t                get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n976\t            })?;\n977\t            candidates.into_iter().map(|c| (beads_dir.parent().unwrap_or(beads_dir).to_path_buf(), c)).collect()\n978\t        };\n979\t\n980\t        if let Some((path, candidate)) = candidates.first() {\n981\t            match format {\n982\t                \"json\" => {\n983\t                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n984\t                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n985\t                        \"title\": \"assignee\": assignee,\n989\t                        \"workspace\": path.display().to_string(),\n990\t                        \"dry_run\": true\n991\t                    });\n992\t                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n993\t                }\n994\t                _ => {\n995\t                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={}, workspace={})\",\n996\t                        candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact, path.display());\n997\t                }\n998\t            }\n999\t        } else if format == \"json\" {\n1000\t            println!(\"{{}}\");\n1001\t        } else {\n1002\t            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n1003\t        }\n1004\t    } else if any {\n1005\t        // Claim from any workspace\n1006\t        let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n1007\t            // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n1008\t            find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n1009\t        } else {\n1010\t            workspace_paths.to_vec()\n1011\t        };\n1012\t\n1013\t        let result = claim_any(&paths, assignee, claim_ttl, Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n1014\t\n1015\t        match result {\n1016\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n1017\t                match format {\n1018\t                    \"json\" => {\n1019\t {})\", bead_id, path.display());\n1030\t                        } else {\n1031\t                            println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1032\t                        }\n1033\t                    }\n1034\t                }\n1035\t            }\n1036\t            None => {\n1037\t                if format == \"json\" {\n1038\t                    println!(\"{{}}\");\n1039\t                } else {\n1040\t                    println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n1041\t                }\n1042\t            }\n1043\t        }\n1044\t    } else if fallback {\n1045\t        // Fallback mode: Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1049\t\n1050\t        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n1051\t            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now(), Some(&worker_metadata))\n1052\t        })?;\n1053\t\n1054\t        match result {\n1055\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, .. }) => {\n1056\t                match format {\n1057\t                    \"json\" => {\n1058\t                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n1059\t                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n1060\t                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n1061\t                            \"assignee\": assignee\n1062\t                        });\n1063\t                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n1064\t                    }\n1065\t                    _ => {\n1066\t                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1067\t                    }\n1068\t                }\n1069\t            }\n1070\t            None => {\n1071\t                // Fallback to any workspace\n1072\t                let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n1073\t                    find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n1074\t                } else {\n1075\t Ok(())\n1206\t}\n1207\t\n1208\tfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1209\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1210\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1211\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1212\t\n1213\t    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n1214\t        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n1215\t    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n1216\t        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n1217\t        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n1218\t    } else if stdin {\n1219\t        parse_stdin()?\n1220\t    } else {\n1221\t        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n1222\t    };\n1223\t\n1224\t    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n1225\t\n1226\t    // Print results\n1227\t    for result in results {\n1228\t        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n1229\t            if let Some(id) = result.id {\n1230\t                println!(\"[op {}] ok: {}\", result.op, id);\n1231\t            } else {\n1232\t                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n1233\t            }\n1234\t        } else {\n1235\t            eprintln!(\"[op {}] error: {}\", result.op, result.error.unwrap_or_default());\n1236\t        }\n1237\t    }\n1238\t\n1239\t    Ok(())\n1240\t}\n1241\t\n1242\tfn cmd_mitosis(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, children: &str, reason: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n1243\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1244\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1245\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1246\t\n1247\t    // Parse children as JSON array of {title, type, priority} or {title, type, {\n1257\t        \"json\" => {\n1258\t            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&results)?);\n1259\t        }\n1260\t        _ => {\n1261\t            // Print child IDs that were     }\n1266\t            }\n1267\t            println!(\"Parent bead {} closed with {} children\", id, results.len() - 2); // -2 for close + last dep\n1268\t        }\n1269\t    }\n1270\t\n1271\t    Ok(())\n1272\t}\n1273\t\n1274\tfn cmd_dep(beads_dir: &PathBuf, dep: DepCommands) -> Result<()> {\n1275\t    match dep {\n1276\t        DepCommands::Add { issue, depends_on, type_ } => {\n1277\t            let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1278\t            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1279\t            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1280\t            let         let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1287\t            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1288\t            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1289\t            storage.remove_dependency(&issue, &depends_on)?;\n1290\t            println!(\"Removed dependency: {} -> {}\", issue, depends_on);\n1291\t        }\n1292\t        DepCommands::List { id } => {\n1293\t     for dep in deps {\n1301\t                    println!(\"  {} depends on {} ({})\", dep.issue_id, dep.depends_on_id, dep.dep_type);\n1302\t                }\n1303\t            }\n1304\t
